narrative:
Cols 81-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,441 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 30.4 percentage points.
